rulings.Case Title: GLORIA YEE VS. FAT NOODLE 2ND SF, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 14,2019 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTS MAPLE WAY LLC, PJ PATTON'S Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement DENIED. The Court SUSTAINS Intervenor's objections on the grounds that affiant lacked personal knowledge. Cross-Defendant failed to provide the Court with any admissible evidence that the Tech-Bilt factors were met in this case. For example, there was not sufficient admissible evidence or information regarding the party's financial condition, policy limits, or potential liability. Counsel's declaration and opinion are not sufficient to enable the Court to make a determination of good faith. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: UMPQUA BANK A STATE CHARTERED BANK VS. RENKA PROP. LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Instructing Court Clerk To Issue Writ Of Possession To Remove Julia Mwangi And All Other Occupants From The Property Located At 195 Eureka Street, Unit 4, San Francisco, California 94114
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 14,2019 line 3. OTHER KEVIN SINGER'S Motion For Order Instructing Court Clerk To Issue Writ Of Possession To Remove Julia Mwangi And All Other Occupants From The Property Located At 195 Eureka Street, Unit 4, San Francisco, California 94114 GRANTED. Pursuant to this Court's Order Appointing Receiver, dated April 6, 2018, the Receiver shall have the power and the responsibility to "take possession of the Subject Property, to exclude and evict [Defendant Renka Prop LLC] or anyone claiming under or through Defendant therefrom who are not under valid leases or rental agreements." Additionally, per this Order, all persons in possession of the Subject Property "and not holding under valid leases, or rental agreements, shall forthwith surrender their possession thereof to the Receiver." = (501/CFH)
